title: Resolve unsigned RPL frame specification
description: Security spec requires every RPL control frame signed, while draft-lichen-link permits routing-affecting unsigned frames in permissive mode and gives unsigned DIO as canonical example. Reconcile normative receiver behavior.
close_reason: Reconciled link/RPL/security specs: RPL control frames (DIO/DAO) now MUST use link-layer signing; removed permissive unsigned routing example. Conventional commit.
